inspected_items.item_title: NEED GONE ASAP NEGOTIABLE Lenovo G34w 34" Ultrawide Curved Gaming Monitor (144Hz, 1440p)
inspected_items.location_hint: MOVING TOMORROW so priced to go fast — serious buyers only please! Selling my Lenovo G34w-10 — a beast of a monitor for gaming or productivity. Panel is in great shape: no dead pixels, no burn-in, no cracks. Colors are vivid and the curve is immersive. One thing to know: the stand is broken, so it won't sit on a desk on its own. BUT — this monitor is fully VESA-compatible (100x100mm), so it mounts directly onto any monitor arm or wall mount. Arms start around $25 on Amazon and honestly most people prefer them anyway. Specs: 34" curved ultrawide — 3440x1440 UWQHD 144Hz refresh rate AMD FreeSync 1500R curvature Inputs: HDMI + DisplayPort Comes with power cable and display cables. No box. Stand included (broken, but yours if you want it). Cash or Venmo. Local pickup only — no shipping, no holding without payment. Moving soon so priced to go fast — serious buyers only please!
